name: Baked Herberd Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Trim any excess fat from the chicken breast and pound lightly between two sheets of waxed paper to flatten.
3. Coat the chicken with olive oil and place in a baking dish.
4. Add wine, lemon juice, herbs (tarragon and basil), and hot red pepper flakes. Turn the chicken to coat both sides.
5. Cover the dish with foil.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serving suggestion: Serve with Quinoa and Spaghetti Squash (Also in this file)
Food Exchange per serving: 4 LOW/FAT MEAT EXCHANGES
Calories: 177
Carbohydrates: 72mg; 1g;
Protein: 27g
Sodium: 68mg
Fat: 5g
